jsonLd.title: HomeLane is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the HomeLane family as a E-commerce Executive in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About HomeLane:
HomeLane is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeLane!
